response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content: 00:00-04:32 is a concert promotional montage with instrumental BGM. 2. Identified a vocal performance from 04:32-04:45 as a promotional jingle for JOYSOUND's 'Do no anime sengen' campaign. 3. Transcribed lyrics from the video as it is an original campaign jingle. 4. Analyzed remaining segments: 04:45-05:00 is instrumental promotional BGM.
response.global_summary: The video features a montage of fan messages and promotional graphics for the Hoshimachi Suisei concert 'SuperNova: REBOOT'. Following the montage, there is a short promotional jingle for the JOYSOUND 'Do no anime sengen' campaign, featuring an animated character singing. The video concludes with promotional slides for merchandise.

scenes.description: Montage of fan messages and promotional graphics for the Hoshimachi Suisei concert 'SuperNova: REBOOT'. Background music is instrumental.
Promotional jingle for the JOYSOUND 'Do no anime sengen' campaign, featuring an animated character singing.
scenes.song_title: どのアニメ宣言 (Do no anime sengen)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
アニメにハマって
歌いたくなっちゃった
推しのシーン見ながら
カラオケ歌えるなんて
尊すぎてツライっ!
歌いたいアニメ・ゲームソング見つけよう
どのアニメ宣言!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hooked on anime
I ended up wanting to sing
Being able to sing karaoke
While watching my favorite scene
It's too precious, it's painful!
Let's find the anime/game song we want to sing
Do no anime sengen!

scenes.description: Promotional slides for merchandise with instrumental background music.
